category_sources: Official repo https://github.com/scdl-org/scdl describes scdl as a SoundCloud music downloader.
source_facts.description says it downloads music from SoundCloud.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the main documentation surface.
Official GitHub wiki provides installation documentation linked from the README.
repo_sources: Official repo https://github.com/scdl-org/scdl matches the package name and description.
source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub source repository.
tags_sources: Official README notes Python 3 and command-line usage.
